title: neolitsea aurata
intro: Neolitsea aurata, also known as the Golden Neolitsea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neolitsea aurata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties. Neolitsea aurata can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in the development of new medicines.
